name: instrument-profiles
description: Synthesize the PWI4 (.cfg) and PHD2 (.reg) instrument profiles at provisioning time. PWI4 site location (Latitude/Longitude/HeightMeters) is taken from the deployed C:\WIS\unit.toml [location] (written by config-bootstrap, order 150); per-unit COM ports for the EFA focuser and PWBus OTA are reverse-located from their USB InstanceID (VID/PID) via Win32_PnPEntity. The mount (Elmo) config is shipped verbatim from MAST02. Final artifacts are staged under C:\ProgramData\MAST\instrument-profiles and applied into the mast user's profile (PWI4 Settings dir + HKCU PHD2 profiles) by an AtLogon scheduled task, because the per-user mast profile is not materialized at provisioning time. Runs at order 1850, after PWI4 (planewave 1700), PHD2 (1400) and the ZWO camera (1800) are installed and after config-bootstrap (150).
